title: rejoua novoguineensis
intro: Rejoua novoguineensis, also known as the Guinea plum, is a tropical plant species native to the island of New Guinea, belonging to the family Meliaceae. The plant has been studied for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rejoua novoguineensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and eczema. Rejoua novoguineensis is often prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, or used in traditional medicine in the form of a paste or ointment.
